landing.title: Plan raids in one place
landing.subtitle: Create raids, collect signups, and check roster coverage before invite time.
landing.valueProps.sharedSchedule.title: Shared schedule
landing.valueProps.sharedSchedule.body: Keep upcoming raids and signups in one place.
landing.valueProps.roleCoverage.title: Role coverage
landing.valueProps.roleCoverage.body: See tank, healer, and DPS coverage at a glance.
landing.valueProps.battleNetSignIn.title: Battle.net sign-in
landing.valueProps.battleNetSignIn.body: Players sign in with Battle.net and use their saved characters.
login.title: Sign in with Battle.net
login.subtitle: Continue with your Battle.net account to keep track of raid signups.
loginFailed.title: Sign in failed
loginFailed.subtitle: Something went wrong during Battle.net authentication. Please try again.
goodbye.title: Account deleted
goodbye.body1: Your stored raider profile has been removed and your Battle.net session has been cleared.
goodbye.body2: Existing raids stay in place, but you no longer have access to the deleted account.
characters.title: Select your character
characters.deleteError: Unable to delete the account right now. Try again in a moment.
forgetMe.title: Forget me
forgetMe.description1: Permanently delete your stored raider profile, clear your Battle.net session, and remove your raid signups.
forgetMe.description2: Existing raids stay visible, but you lose access to the deleted account and anything tied to it.
guild.title: Guild
guild.description: Review the active guild, keep its slogan current, and manage rank-gated raid settings from one shared surface.
guild.noGuild.title: No guild on the active character
guild.noGuild.body: Select a character that belongs to a guild to unlock the shared guild surface.
guild.rankSyncStale: Rank sync is stale. Guild settings are locked until roster data refreshes.
guild.chip.cannotCreate: Guild raid creation blocked for your rank
guild.chip.canSignup: You can sign up to guild raids
guild.chip.cannotSignup: Guild signup blocked for your rank
guildAdmin.title: Guild admin
guildAdmin.description: Resolve a guild explicitly, then edit the same settings through the site-admin override path.
guildIdentity.title: Guild identity
guildSettings.allowCreate: Allow guild raid creation for Rank {{rank}}
guildSettings.allowSignup: Allow guild raid signup for Rank {{rank}}
raids.title: Raids
raids.selectPrompt: Select a raid to view details.
createRaid.title: Create Raid
raidSignup.guildRankBlocked: Guild signup is not enabled for your rank.
notAttending.title: Not Attending ({{count}})
privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.data.heading: Your data
privacy.data.body: We store your Battle.net ID, guild membership, character data, raid signups, and language preference. This data is used solely to run the raid calendar. We do not use it for analytics, advertising, or profiling, and we never share it with third parties.
privacy.cookies.heading: Cookies
privacy.cookies.body: One HttpOnly session cookie keeps you signed in. No tracking or third-party cookies.
privacy.thirdParty.heading: Third-party services
privacy.thirdParty.body: Authentication is handled by Battle.net OAuth (see Blizzard's privacy policy). Hosting and storage are on Microsoft Azure (North Europe).
privacy.retention.heading: Data retention
privacy.retention.body: Raids expire 7 days after their start time. Raider profiles are deleted after 90 days of inactivity. You can delete your data immediately using "Forget me" on the character selection page.
privacy.contact.heading: Contact
privacy.contact.body: Questions about your data? Contact us at {{contactEmail}}.
